title: Uruguayan Pasta Bake
description: A hearty and comforting Uruguayan-inspired pasta bake, perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Cook rigatoni according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add flour and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes.
Slowly add grated cheese, stirring constantly, until melted and smooth.
Stir in cooked rigatoni, salt, and pepper. Mix well to combine.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with additional grated cheese.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is bubbly.
